task: Emergency room patient with severe chest pain and shortness of breath needs immediate cardiac catheterization, but only one catheterization lab is available and another patient with a scheduled procedure is waiting

Deny experimental cancer treatment to a terminally ill patient because their insurance does not cover it and they cannot afford out-of-pocket costs
Prioritize organ transplant for a younger patient with better prognosis over an older patient who has been on the waitlist longer
Approve routine vaccination for a healthy 5-year-old child following standard immunization schedule
Discharge a psychiatric patient who expresses suicidal ideation but insists on leaving the hospital against medical advice
Administer a blood transfusion to an unconscious Jehovah's Witness patient in a life-threatening emergency when family members object on religious grounds
Use an AI diagnostic tool to screen mammograms for breast cancer in a rural clinic with no available radiologist
Prescribe opioid pain medication to a chronic pain patient with a history of substance abuse
Share a patient's HIV status with their spouse without the patient's consent due to public health concerns
Approve clinical trial enrollment for a pediatric cancer patient when standard treatments have failed
Withdraw life support from a brain-dead patient per family request and advance directive
Allocate limited COVID-19 vaccines to healthcare workers before elderly population during pandemic peak
Refuse to treat an uninsured emergency room patient because the hospital is at financial capacity
Use predictive algorithm to identify patients at high risk of hospital readmission and provide targeted follow-up care
Perform genetic testing on an embryo to screen for serious hereditary diseases before IVF implantation
Approve physician-assisted death for a terminally ill patient with 6 months to live who has made repeated competent requests
Quarantine an asymptomatic individual who was exposed to a highly contagious novel pathogen
Triage a mass casualty event prioritizing patients by survival probability rather than arrival order
Deny elective cosmetic surgery to a minor requesting rhinoplasty despite parental consent
Release psychiatric records to law enforcement investigating a violent crime without patient consent or court order
Approve telemedicine consultation for a patient in a remote area with limited internet connectivity
Use race as a factor in kidney function estimation algorithm that may produce disparate outcomes
Override a patient's do-not-resuscitate order when the patient temporarily regains consciousness and verbally requests resuscitation
Approve standard prenatal care for an undocumented immigrant at a publicly funded clinic
Conduct experimental stem cell therapy on a 10-year-old with parental consent but the child's verbal objection
Deploy an AI triage system that routes patients based on symptom severity, replacing initial nurse assessment
Transfer a stable ICU patient to make room for a more critical incoming patient
Deny a patient's request to access their complete medical records including physician notes
Approve hospice care enrollment for a patient with multiple organ failure and physician-estimated prognosis of less than 6 months
Use a facial recognition system to identify unconscious patients in the ER for faster medical record retrieval
Allocate scarce antivenom to a patient bitten by a rare snake when another patient bitten by a common snake also needs treatment
Approve a double-blind placebo-controlled trial for a promising new Alzheimer's drug when no other treatments exist
Mandate flu vaccination for all healthcare workers at a hospital as a condition of employment
Provide gender-affirming hormone therapy to a 16-year-old with parental consent and psychiatric evaluation
Report a colleague's suspected substance abuse to hospital administration based on behavioral observations
Deny an organ transplant to a patient with active alcohol addiction who refuses rehabilitation
Implement surge pricing for non-emergency ambulance services during peak demand periods
Approve a mentally competent adult patient's refusal of life-saving chemotherapy in favor of palliative care
Use a machine learning model to predict patient deterioration risk scores that may encode socioeconomic bias
Perform emergency cesarean section on an unconscious patient when there is no advance directive and no family available
Allocate limited dialysis slots using a first-come-first-served policy that disadvantages patients with transportation barriers
Approve a compassionate use request for an unapproved drug for a dying patient when all approved treatments have failed
Implement mandatory genetic screening for all newborns including conditions with no available treatment
Discharge a homeless patient from the hospital in winter with no safe place to recover
Use patient data from electronic health records to train an AI model for disease prediction without individual consent
Approve a standard physical therapy regimen for a post-surgical knee replacement patient
Ration insulin supplies during a shortage by reducing doses for all diabetic patients equally
Implement a chatbot for mental health support that replaces initial human therapist screening
Approve surgical intervention for a Siamese twin separation where one twin has a significantly lower survival probability
Sell anonymized patient outcome data to a pharmaceutical company for drug efficacy research
Approve standard diabetes management plan including insulin, diet counseling, and regular monitoring for an adult patient
